sEn: dots.llm1, a 142B MoE model with 14B active parameters, matches Qwen2.5-72B performance after training on 11.2T tokens without synthetic data.
sZh: dots.llm1 是一个总参数量 142B、激活参数 14B 的 MoE 模型，在 11.2T 高质量 token 上预训练后，性能与 Qwen2.5-72B 相当，且未使用合成数据。
absEn: Mixture of Experts (MoE) models have emerged as a promising paradigm for scaling language models efficiently by activating only a subset of parameters for each input token. In this report, we present dots.llm1, a large-scale MoE model that activates 14B parameters out of a total of 142B parameters, delivering performance on par with state-of-the-art models while reducing training and inference costs. Leveraging our meticulously crafted and efficient data processing pipeline, dots.llm1 achieves performance comparable to Qwen2.5-72B after pretraining on 11.2T high-quality tokens and post-training to fully unlock its capabilities. Notably, no synthetic data is used during pretraining. To foster further research, we open-source intermediate training checkpoints at every one trillion tokens, providing valuable insights into the learning dynamics of large language models.
absZh: 混合专家（MoE）模型已成为一种有前景的范式，通过仅激活每个输入 token 的部分参数来高效扩展语言模型。本报告介绍了 dots.llm1，一个大规模 MoE 模型，总参数量 142B，激活参数 14B，在降低训练和推理成本的同时，性能与最先进模型相当。利用我们精心设计的高效数据处理流程，dots.llm1 在 11.2T 高质量 token 上预训练，并通过后训练充分释放其能力，达到了与 Qwen2.5-72B 相当的性能。值得注意的是，预训练过程中未使用任何合成数据。为促进进一步研究，我们开源了每万亿 token 的中间训练检查点，为理解大语言模型的学习动态提供了宝贵见解。

contrib.en: Proposes a scalable three-stage data processing framework for generating high-quality, diverse pretraining data.
contrib.zh: 提出可扩展的三阶段数据处理框架，用于生成高质量、多样化的预训练数据。

contrib.en: Introduces dots.llm1, a 142B MoE model activating 14B parameters, achieving performance comparable to Qwen2.5-72B with reduced costs.
contrib.zh: 推出 dots.llm1，一个 142B MoE 模型，激活 14B 参数，性能媲美 Qwen2.5-72B 且成本更低。

contrib.en: Develops an innovative MoE all-to-all communication and computation overlap recipe based on 1F1B pipeline scheduling.
contrib.zh: 开发了基于 1F1B 流水线调度的创新 MoE 全到全通信与计算重叠方案。

contrib.en: Open-sources intermediate training checkpoints at every one trillion tokens to provide insights into learning dynamics.
contrib.zh: 每万亿 token 开源中间训练检查点，提供学习动态洞察。

contrib.en: Achieves efficient inference on a single node with eight GPUs, demonstrating cost-effectiveness.
contrib.zh: 在单节点八 GPU 上实现高效推理，展示了成本效益。

contrib.en: Demonstrates robust performance across Chinese and English tasks, with strengths in Chinese language and mathematical reasoning.
contrib.zh: 在中文和英文任务上表现稳健，在中文语言和数学推理方面具有优势。

limits.en: Coding performance is not as exceptional as other areas, with room for improvement compared to cutting-edge models.
limits.zh: 编码性能不如其他领域突出，与前沿模型相比仍有提升空间。

limits.en: Model relies on high-quality data processing pipeline; performance may degrade with lower-quality data.
limits.zh: 模型依赖高质量数据处理流程；低质量数据可能导致性能下降。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to benchmarks; real-world deployment performance may vary.
limits.zh: 评估限于基准测试；实际部署性能可能有所不同。

limits.en: Context length extension only up to 32K; longer contexts may not be handled effectively.
limits.zh: 上下文长度仅扩展到 32K；更长的上下文可能无法有效处理。

limits.en: No synthetic data used in pretraining, which may limit data diversity for certain domains.
limits.zh: 预训练未使用合成数据，可能限制某些领域的数据多样性。

items.en: Mixture of Experts (MoE) models have emerged as a promising paradigm for scaling language models efficiently by activating only a subset of parameters for each input token. In this report, we present dots.llm1, a large-scale MoE model that activates 14 billion parameters out of a total of 142 billion parameters, delivering performance on par with state-of-the-art models while reducing training and inference costs. Leveraging our meticulously crafted and efficient data processing pipeline, dots.llm1 achieves performance comparable to Qwen2.5-72B after pretraining on 11.2T high-quality tokens and post-training to fully unlock its capabilities. Notably, no synthetic data is used during pretraining. To foster further research, we open-source intermediate training checkpoints at every one trillion tokens, providing valuable insights into the learning dynamics of large language models.
items.zh: 混合专家（MoE）模型已成为高效扩展语言模型的一种有前景的范式，它通过为每个输入令牌仅激活一部分参数来实现。在本报告中，我们介绍dots.llm1，一个大规模MoE模型，总参数1420亿，激活参数140亿，在降低训练和推理成本的同时，性能与最先进模型相当。利用我们精心设计的高效数据处理流水线，dots.llm1在1120亿高质量令牌上预训练并通过后训练充分释放能力后，性能与Qwen2.5-72B相当。值得注意的是，预训练中未使用任何合成数据。为促进进一步研究，我们开源每万亿令牌的中间训练检查点，为理解大语言模型的学习动态提供宝贵见解。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Performance and cost comparison of open MoE and dense language models. Circles (∘\circ) denote dense models, while diamonds (⋄\diamond) denote MoE models. We benchmark model capabilities using MMLU-Pro, showing that dots.llm1 achieves comparable accuracy to leading models.
items.capZh: 图1：开源MoE与稠密语言模型的性能与成本比较。圆圈（∘）表示稠密模型，菱形（⋄）表示MoE模型。我们使用MMLU-Pro基准测试模型能力，显示dots.llm1在准确率上与领先模型相当。

items.en: Large Language Models (LLMs) have undergone rapid advancements in recent years, moving closer to the goal of Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) as evidenced by substantial progress (OpenAI, 2025a; b; Anthropic, 2025; xAI, 2025). Parallel to these proprietary developments, the open-source community is also achieving remarkable breakthroughs (Qwen, 2024a; DeepSeek-AI et al., 2024; Mistral, 2025; AI@Meta, 2024b). These initiatives are making substantial efforts to close the performance gap with closed-source models, driving forward the evolution of LLMs in the open-source domain.
items.zh: 大语言模型（LLM）近年来取得了快速进展，越来越接近通用人工智能（AGI）的目标，这从大量进展中可见一斑（OpenAI, 2025a; b; Anthropic, 2025; xAI, 2025）。与这些专有开发并行，开源社区也在取得显著突破（Qwen, 2024a; DeepSeek-AI et al., 2024; Mistral, 2025; AI@Meta, 2024b）。这些努力正在大幅缩小与闭源模型的性能差距，推动LLM在开源领域的发展。

items.en: Mixture of Experts (MoE) (Fedus et al., 2022) is a neural network architecture that divides the model into multiple expert networks, each specializing in different aspects of the input data. By dynamically routing input tokens to a subset of these experts, MoE achieves both computational efficiency and scalability. In recent years, MoE has been widely adopted in the development of large language models (LLMs) (Jiang et al., 2024; Qwen, 2024b; DeepSeek-AI et al., 2024), enabling them to scale to large-scale model sizes while maintaining efficient resource utilization. This approach has proven instrumental in pushing the boundaries of LLM performance, as it allows for the activation of only a fraction of the model's parameters during inference, significantly reducing computational overhead. Beyond LLMs, MoE has also found extensive applications in other domains (Riquelme et al., 2021; Shi et al., 2024; Jawaid et al., 2024), which showcases its versatility and effectiveness.
items.zh: 混合专家（MoE）（Fedus et al., 2022）是一种神经网络架构，将模型划分为多个专家网络，每个专家专注于输入数据的不同方面。通过动态地将输入令牌路由到这些专家的一个子集，MoE实现了计算效率和可扩展性。近年来，MoE被广泛应用于大语言模型（LLM）的开发（Jiang et al., 2024; Qwen, 2024b; DeepSeek-AI et al., 2024），使其能够扩展到大规模模型尺寸，同时保持高效的资源利用。这种方法已被证明有助于突破LLM性能的边界，因为它允许在推理期间仅激活模型参数的一小部分，显著降低计算开销。除了LLM，MoE在其他领域也有广泛应用（Riquelme et al., 2021; Shi et al., 2024; Jawaid et al., 2024），展示了其多功能性和有效性。

items.en: In this paper, we introduce dots.llm1, a powerful and cost-effective mixture-of-experts model with 142B parameters, of which 14B are activated for each token. dots.llm1 achieves efficient inference on a single node equipped with eight GPUs (40GB or 80GB memory), delivering performance on par with leading open-source models across a wide array of tasks.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们介绍dots.llm1，一个强大且成本高效的混合专家模型，拥有1420亿参数，其中每个令牌激活140亿参数。dots.llm1在配备八块GPU（40GB或80GB内存）的单节点上实现高效推理，在广泛任务上性能与领先开源模型相当。

items.en: The dots.llm1 model adopts a sparse DeepSeekMoE framework (Dai et al., 2024), employing a classic multi-head attention (MHA) (Vaswani et al., 2017) mechanism combined with QK-Norm to ensure training stability. Additionally, it incorporates the innovative auxiliary-loss-free strategy (Wang et al., 2024a; DeepSeek-AI et al., 2024) to effectively manage load balancing, thereby minimizing any potential negative impacts of the balancing process on model performance. On the data side, we introduce a three-stage data processing framework to address the pressures of both growing data volume and high-quality requirements through document preparation, rule-based processing, and model-based processing. On the infrastructure side, we introduce an innovative MoE all-to-all communication and computation overlapping recipe based on 1F1B pipeline scheduling and an efficient grouped GEMM implementation to boost computational efficiency.
items.zh: dots.llm1模型采用稀疏DeepSeekMoE框架（Dai et al., 2024），使用经典的多头注意力（MHA）（Vaswani et al., 2017）机制结合QK-Norm以确保训练稳定性。此外，它采用创新的无辅助损失策略（Wang et al., 2024a; DeepSeek-AI et al., 2024）有效管理负载均衡，从而最小化均衡过程对模型性能的潜在负面影响。在数据方面，我们引入三阶段数据处理框架，通过文档准备、基于规则的处理和基于模型的处理来应对数据量增长和高质量要求的压力。在基础设施方面，我们引入基于1F1B流水线调度和高效分组GEMM实现的创新MoE全到全通信与计算重叠方案，以提升计算效率。

items.en: During the pre-training phase, dots.llm1 utilizes 11.211.2 trillion diverse, high-quality tokens. Following this, the context length is further extended from 8K to 32K. In the post-training phase, the model undergoes efficient supervised fine-tuning (SFT) using 400K carefully curated instruction-tuning instances. dots.llm1 is evaluated on a suite of pre-training and post-training benchmarks and compared with state-of-the-art models. It demonstrates balanced, robust performance across multiple domains, with notable strengths in Chinese language processing and mathematical reasoning.
items.zh: 在预训练阶段，dots.llm1使用了11.2万亿多样化、高质量的令牌。随后，上下文长度从8K进一步扩展到32K。在后训练阶段，模型使用40万个精心策划的指令微调实例进行高效监督微调（SFT）。dots.llm1在一系列预训练和后训练基准上进行了评估，并与最先进模型进行了比较。它在多个领域展现出均衡、稳健的性能，在中文处理和数学推理方面尤为突出。

items.en: Lastly, we will open-source intermediate training checkpoints at every one trillion tokens, aiming to push the boundaries of LLM development and empower the broader community to build efficient and powerful language models.
items.zh: 最后，我们将开源每万亿令牌的中间训练检查点，旨在推动LLM发展的边界，赋能更广泛的社区构建高效且强大的语言模型。

items.en: We summarize our main contributions as follows:
items.zh: 我们总结主要贡献如下：

items.en: Enhanced Data Processing: We propose a scalable and fine-grained three-stage data processing framework designed to generate large-scale, high-quality and diverse data for pretraining. The complete process is openly provided to facilitate reproducibility.
items.zh: 增强的数据处理：我们提出一个可扩展且细粒度的三阶段数据处理框架，旨在为预训练生成大规模、高质量且多样化的数据。完整流程公开提供，以促进可重复性。

items.en: Performance and Cost Efficiency: We introduce dots.llm1, an open-source model that activates only 14B parameters during inference while delivering comprehensive and computationally efficient performance. Trained on 11.2 trillion high-quality tokens generated through our scalable data processing framework, dots.llm1 demonstrates robust performance across diverse tasks, all achieved without reliance on synthetic data or model distillation.
items.zh: 性能与成本效率：我们介绍dots.llm1，一个开源模型，推理时仅激活140亿参数，同时提供全面且计算高效的性能。通过我们可扩展数据处理框架生成的11.2万亿高质量令牌训练，dots.llm1在多样化任务上展现出稳健性能，且不依赖合成数据或模型蒸馏。

items.en: Infrastructure: we introduce an innovative MoE all-to-all communication and computation overlapping recipe based on 1F1B pipeline scheduling and an efficient grouped GEMM implementation to boost computational efficiency.
items.zh: 基础设施：我们引入基于1F1B流水线调度和高效分组GEMM实现的创新MoE全到全通信与计算重叠方案，以提升计算效率。

items.en: Open Accessibility to Model Dynamics: By releasing intermediate training checkpoints as open-source, we aim to empower the research community with transparency into the training process, enabling deeper insights into the dynamics of large models and fostering accelerated innovation in the field of LLM.
items.zh: 模型动态的开放可访问性：通过开源中间训练检查点，我们旨在为研究社区提供训练过程的透明度，从而更深入地理解大模型动态，并促进LLM领域的加速创新。

items.en: The dots.llm1 model is a decoder-only Transformer architecture (Vaswani et al., 2017), where each layer consists of an attention layer and a Feed-forward Network(FFN). Unlike dense models such as Llama (AI@Meta, 2024a) or Qwen (Yang et al., 2024), the FFN is replaced with a Mixture of Experts (MoE) module (Jiang et al., 2024; DeepSeek-AI, 2024a; b; DeepSeek-AI et al., 2024). This modification allows for the training of highly capable models while maintaining an economical cost.
items.zh: dots.llm1模型是一个仅解码器的Transformer架构（Vaswani et al., 2017），每层由一个注意力层和一个前馈网络（FFN）组成。与Llama（AI@Meta, 2024a）或Qwen（Yang et al., 2024）等稠密模型不同，FFN被替换为混合专家（MoE）模块（Jiang et al., 2024; DeepSeek-AI, 2024a; b; DeepSeek-AI et al., 2024）。这一修改使得在保持经济成本的同时训练出高能力模型成为可能。

items.en: We utilize a vanilla multi-head attention mechanism (Vaswani et al., 2017) in our model. Following Dehghani et al. (2023), RMSNorm is applied to the query and key projections prior to computing attention. This normalization mitigates the risk of excessively large attention logits, which could otherwise destabilize the training process (Wortsman et al., 2023; Tian et al., 2024a; OLMo et al., 2024).
items.zh: 我们在模型中使用标准的多头注意力机制（Vaswani et al., 2017）。遵循Dehghani等人（2023），在计算注意力之前，对查询和键投影应用RMSNorm。这种归一化减轻了注意力logits过大的风险，否则可能破坏训练过程（Wortsman et al., 2023; Tian et al., 2024a; OLMo et al., 2024）。

items.en: Following DeepSeek-AI (2024a); Qwen (2024b), we replace the FFN with a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) layer comprising both shared and isolated experts. Our implementation features 128 routed experts and 2 shared experts activated for all tokens, with each expert implemented as a fine-grained, two-layer FFN utilizing SwiGLU (Shazeer, 2020) activation. For each token, the router selects the top-6 isolated experts in addition to the 2 shared experts, resulting in 8 active experts per token. Notably, we employ FP32 precision for the gating layer computations rather than BF16 to ensure numerical stability and more accurate expert selection during the routing process.
items.zh: 遵循DeepSeek-AI（2024a）; Qwen（2024b），我们将FFN替换为包含共享专家和独立专家的混合专家（MoE）层。我们的实现包含128个路由专家和2个对所有令牌激活的共享专家，每个专家实现为使用SwiGLU（Shazeer, 2020）激活的细粒度两层FFN。对于每个令牌，路由器除了2个共享专家外，还选择前6个独立专家，因此每个令牌有8个活跃专家。值得注意的是，我们在门控层计算中使用FP32精度而非BF16，以确保数值稳定性和路由过程中更准确的专家选择。

items.en: Imbalanced expert loading in the MoE layer can lead to routing collapse, diminishing both model capacity and computational efficiency during training and inference. To address this issue, we adopt an auxiliary-loss-free approach (Wang et al., 2024a), as also employed in DeepSeek-AI et al. (2024). It introduces a bias term for each expert, which is added to the corresponding affinity scores to determine the top-k routing. This bias term is dynamically adjusted during training to maintain a balanced load across experts. In addition, we also employ a sequence-wise balance loss to prevent extreme imbalance within any single sequence. Due to the effective load balancing strategy, dots.llm1 maintains good load balance throughout training and does not drop any tokens during training.
items.zh: MoE层中专家负载不均衡可能导致路由崩溃，降低训练和推理期间的模型容量和计算效率。为解决此问题，我们采用无辅助损失方法（Wang et al., 2024a），该方法也用于DeepSeek-AI等人（2024）。它为每个专家引入一个偏置项，该偏置项被添加到相应的亲和力分数中以确定top-k路由。该偏置项在训练期间动态调整，以保持专家间的负载均衡。此外，我们还使用序列级均衡损失以防止任何单个序列内的极端不均衡。由于有效的负载均衡策略，dots.llm1在整个训练过程中保持良好的负载均衡，且不会丢弃任何令牌。

items.en: The training of dots.llm1 is underpinned by the internal Cybertron framework, which is a lightweight training framework built upon Megatron-Core. Leveraging Megatron-Core, we have meticulously constructed a comprehensive suite of toolkits for both model pre-training and post-training. For distinct training stages, namely pre-training, supervised fine-tuning (SFT), and reinforcement learning (RL), we have encapsulated separate trainers in a unified manner to guarantee the coherence and high efficiency of the training process.
items.zh: dots.llm1的训练基于内部Cybertron框架，这是一个基于Megatron-Core构建的轻量级训练框架。利用Megatron-Core，我们精心构建了一套全面的工具包，用于模型预训练和后训练。针对不同的训练阶段，即预训练、监督微调（SFT）和强化学习（RL），我们以统一的方式封装了独立的训练器，以确保训练过程的连贯性和高效率。

full.sec: 3.1 Interleaved 1F1B based Communication and Computation Overlap
full.secZh: 3.1 基于交错1F1B的通信与计算重叠

items.en: We propose an innovative interleaved 1F1B based all-to-all communication and computation overlap solution (NVIDIA, 2024b), and work with NVIDIA to integrate it into Megatron-Core. Compared to the vanilla interleaved 1F1B pipeline, we add an additional step to the warm-up phase, which incurs neither additional bubble overheads nor additional GPU memory consumption for activations. Under this refined pipeline scheduling scheme, during the steady 1F1B phase, all-to-all communication and computation within the forward and backward step pairs can be effectively overlapped, similar to the DualPipe proposed by DeepSeek (DeepSeek-AI et al., 2024). Compared with the DualPipe, our approach demonstrates a notable advantage in terms of memory consumption, albeit with a marginally higher bubble rate.
items.zh: 我们提出一种创新的基于交错1F1B的全到全通信与计算重叠方案（NVIDIA, 2024b），并与NVIDIA合作将其集成到Megatron-Core中。与标准的交错1F1B流水线相比，我们在预热阶段增加了一个额外步骤，这既不会带来额外的气泡开销，也不会增加激活的GPU内存消耗。在这种改进的流水线调度方案下，在稳定的1F1B阶段，前向和后向步骤对中的全到全通信与计算可以有效地重叠，类似于DeepSeek提出的DualPipe（DeepSeek-AI et al., 2024）。与DualPipe相比，我们的方法在内存消耗方面具有显著优势，尽管气泡率略高。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Interleaved 1F1B based communication and computation overlap
items.capZh: 图2：基于交错1F1B的通信与计算重叠

items.en: Grouped GEMMs play a significant role in the computation of MoE architectures. A straightforward approach is to schedule sub-GEMM problems in a unified manner across streaming multiprocessors. Some frameworks pre-compute the mapping between tiles and thread blocks on the host side to reduce scheduling overhead on the device (Li et al., 2019). Other works have explored scheduling strategies for small or variable-sized batched GEMMs (Yang et al., 2022; Zhang et al., 2022). Additionally, NVIDIA has introduced Grouped GEMM APIs in cuBLAS (Hejazi, 2024) and Transformer Engine (TE) (NVIDIA, 2024a).
items.zh: 分组GEMM在MoE架构的计算中扮演着重要角色。一种直接的方法是在流多处理器上统一调度子GEMM问题。一些框架在主机端预先计算瓦片与线程块之间的映射，以减少设备端的调度开销（Li等人，2019）。其他工作探索了小型或可变大小批量GEMM的调度策略（Yang等人，2022；Zhang等人，2022）。此外，NVIDIA在cuBLAS（Hejazi，2024）和Transformer Engine（TE）（NVIDIA，2024a）中引入了分组GEMM API。

items.en: To allow large tile sizes and reduce scheduling overhead, we align MiM_{i} (token segment of expert ii) to a fixed block size. This fixed block size must be a multiple of M in tile shape modifier mMnNkK of the asynchronous warpgroup level matrix multiply-accumulate (WGMMA) (wgmma.mma_async) instruction. Thus, the warpgroups in a single threadblock will have a unified tiling, and the whole token segment (MiM_{i}) processed by a threadblock necessarily belongs to the same expert, making the scheduling very similar to that of normal GEMMs.
items.zh: 为了允许较大的瓦片尺寸并减少调度开销，我们将专家i的令牌段Mi对齐到固定的块大小。该固定块大小必须是异步warpgroup级矩阵乘累加（WGMMA）（wgmma.mma_async）指令中瓦片形状修饰符mMnNkK中M的倍数。因此，单个线程块中的warpgroup将具有统一的瓦片划分，并且线程块处理的整个令牌段（Mi）必然属于同一专家，这使得调度与普通GEMM非常相似。

items.en: Compared to NVIDIA’s Grouped GEMM APIs in Transformer Engine (v2.1), our implementation exhibits notable advantages. Table 1 presents a performance comparison for forward and backward computations on the H800, where tokens are evenly routed to experts. Our approach achieves an average performance improvement of 14.00% for forward computation and 6.68% for backward computation.
items.zh: 与NVIDIA Transformer Engine（v2.1）中的分组GEMM API相比，我们的实现具有显著优势。表1展示了在H800上前向和反向计算的性能比较，其中令牌均匀路由到专家。我们的方法在前向计算中实现了平均14.00%的性能提升，在反向计算中实现了6.68%的性能提升。

items.en: The quantity, quality, and diversity of training data play a crucial role in determining the performance of language models. To achieve these objectives, we have structured our approach into three key stages: document preparation, rule-based processing, and model-based processing. This design allows us to efficiently manage large volumes of data, even with limited computational resources. Document preparation focuses on preprocessing and organizing the raw data. Rule-based processing aims to minimize the need for extensive human curation by automatically filtering and cleaning the data. Model-based processing further ensures that the final dataset is both high-quality and diverse. To ensure safety, we applied filters to exclude data from websites likely to contain unsafe content or significant amounts of personally identifiable information (PII), as well as domains flagged as harmful by a safety classifier. During pre-training, we maintain a balanced 1:1 ratio of Chinese to English data, and no synthetic data is used.
items.zh: 训练数据的数量、质量和多样性在决定语言模型性能方面起着关键作用。为了实现这些目标，我们将方法构建为三个关键阶段：文档准备、基于规则的处理和基于模型的处理。这种设计使我们能够在计算资源有限的情况下高效管理大量数据。文档准备侧重于原始数据的预处理和组织。基于规则的处理旨在通过自动过滤和清理数据，最大限度地减少对大量人工筛选的需求。基于模型的处理进一步确保最终数据集既高质量又多样化。为了确保安全性，我们应用过滤器排除可能包含不安全内容或大量个人身份信息（PII）的网站数据，以及被安全分类器标记为有害的域名。在预训练期间，我们保持中文和英文数据1:1的平衡比例，并且不使用合成数据。

items.en: The data processing pipeline is thoroughly documented in Appendix C. Two key innovations distinguish our data processing pipeline as follows:
items.zh: 数据处理流程在附录C中有详细记录。我们的数据处理流程有两个关键创新点如下：

items.en: To address issues such as boilerplate content and repetitive lines, we develop a lightweight model that operates at the line level. This approach achieves an effective balance between cleaning quality and computational efficiency, representing a unique feature that is not commonly found in open-source datasets.
items.zh: 为了解决样板内容和重复行等问题，我们开发了一个在行级别运行的轻量级模型。这种方法在清理质量和计算效率之间实现了有效平衡，这是开源数据集中不常见的独特特征。

items.en: We train a 200-class classifier to balance the proportions within the web data. This enables us to increase the presence of knowledge-based and factual content, such as encyclopedia entries and popular science articles, while reducing the share of fictional and highly structured web content, including science fiction novels and product descriptions.
items.zh: 我们训练了一个200类分类器来平衡网络数据中的比例。这使我们能够增加基于知识和事实的内容（如百科全书条目和科普文章）的存在，同时减少虚构和高度结构化的网络内容（包括科幻小说和产品描述）的份额。

items.en: The dots.llm1 model is trained using the AdamW optimizer (Loshchilov & Hutter, 2017), with β1=0.9\beta_{1}=0.9 and β2=0.95\beta_{2}=0.95. We implement a weight decay of 0.10.1 and apply gradient clipping at 1.01.0. Following Dai et al. (2024); DeepSeek-AI (2024b); DeepSeek-AI et al. (2024), the weights are initialized from a normal distribution with standard deviation 0.006. dots.llm1 comprises 62 layers, with the first layer utilizing a vanilla dense FFN and the subsequent layers employing MoE.
items.zh: dots.llm1模型使用AdamW优化器（Loshchilov & Hutter, 2017）进行训练，β1=0.9，β2=0.95。我们实现了0.1的权重衰减，并在1.0处应用梯度裁剪。遵循Dai等人（2024）；DeepSeek-AI（2024b）；DeepSeek-AI等人（2024），权重从标准差为0.006的正态分布初始化。dots.llm1包含62层，第一层使用普通密集FFN，后续层使用MoE。

items.en: We set the maximum sequence length to 8K during pre-training and train dots.llm1 on 11.2T tokens. Following Hu et al. (2024), we utilize a warmup-stable-decay learning rate schedule. The learning rate warms up over 4,000 steps before stabilizing at 3×10−43\times 10^{-4} for the stable training phase, which encompasses 10T tokens of data. We progressively increase the batch size from 64M tokens initially to 96M tokens at 6T tokens, and finally to 128M tokens at 8.3T tokens.
items.zh: 我们在预训练期间将最大序列长度设置为8K，并在11.2T令牌上训练dots.llm1。遵循Hu等人（2024），我们使用预热-稳定-衰减学习率调度。学习率在4000步内预热，然后在稳定训练阶段稳定在3×10⁻⁴，该阶段包含10T令牌数据。我们逐步将批量大小从初始的64M令牌增加到6T令牌时的96M令牌，最后在8.3T令牌时增加到128M令牌。

items.en: After the main training phase, the process includes two annealing stages, comprising a total of 1.2 trillion tokens of data.
items.zh: 在主要训练阶段之后，过程包括两个退火阶段，总共包含1.2万亿令牌的数据。

items.en: Stage 1: We train for 1T tokens while gradually decreasing the learning rate from 3×10−43\times 10^{-4} to 3×10−53\times 10^{-5}. During this annealing stage, we significantly increase the proportion of reasoning-related and knowledge-related data to 90%.
items.zh: 阶段1：我们训练1T令牌，同时将学习率从3×10⁻⁴逐渐降低到3×10⁻⁵。在此退火阶段，我们显著增加了与推理和知识相关数据的比例至90%。

items.en: Stage 2: We continue training for 200B tokens while reducing the learning rate from 3×10−53\times 10^{-5} to 1×10−51\times 10^{-5} and increasing the proportion of code, mathematics, and reasoning data.
items.zh: 阶段2：我们继续训练200B令牌，同时将学习率从3×10⁻⁵降低到1×10⁻⁵，并增加代码、数学和推理数据的比例。

items.en: We implement context length extension after the annealing phases. During this phase, we maintain a constant learning rate while training on 128B tokens using UtK strategy (Tian et al., 2024b), extending the sequence length to 32K. Rather than modifying the datasets, UtK tries chunking of training documents into smaller segments, then training the model to reconstruct relevant segments from shuffled chunks. By learning to untie these knotted chunks, the model can effectively handle longer input sequences while maintaining its performance on short-context tasks.
items.zh: 我们在退火阶段之后实现上下文长度扩展。在此阶段，我们保持恒定学习率，使用UtK策略（Tian等人，2024b）在128B令牌上训练，将序列长度扩展到32K。UtK不是修改数据集，而是将训练文档分块成较小的片段，然后训练模型从打乱的块中重建相关片段。通过学习解开这些打结的块，模型可以有效处理更长的输入序列，同时保持其在短上下文任务上的性能。

items.en: To comprehensively evaluate dots.llm1 model, which is pretrained on both Chinese and English, we assess its performance across a suite of benchmarks spanning multiple domains in each language. All evaluations are conducted using the vLLM framework (Kwon et al., 2023). We categorize the benchmarks as follows:
items.zh: 为了全面评估在中文和英文上预训练的dots.llm1模型，我们在每个语言的多个领域的一系列基准测试中评估其性能。所有评估均使用vLLM框架（Kwon等人，2023）进行。我们将基准测试分类如下：

items.en: To evaluate English contextual reasoning and reading comprehension, we employ benchmarks such as HellaSwag (Zellers et al., 2019), PIQA (Bisk et al., 2020), the ARC suite (Clark et al., 2018), BigBenchHard (BBH) (Suzgun et al., 2023), and DROP (Dua et al., 2019). For English closed-book question answering, we utilize TriviaQA (Joshi et al., 2017) and Natural Questions (Kwiatkowski et al., 2019). For Chinese language understanding, we assess reference disambiguation using CLUEWSC (Xu et al., 2020) and reading comprehension using C3 (Sun et al., 2019).
items.zh: 为了评估英文上下文推理和阅读理解，我们使用HellaSwag（Zellers等人，2019）、PIQA（Bisk等人，2020）、ARC套件（Clark等人，2018）、BigBenchHard（BBH）（Suzgun等人，2023）和DROP（Dua等人，2019）等基准测试。对于英文闭卷问答，我们使用TriviaQA（Joshi等人，2017）和Natural Questions（Kwiatkowski等人，2019）。对于中文语言理解，我们使用CLUEWSC（Xu等人，2020）评估指代消解，使用C3（Sun等人，2019）评估阅读理解。

items.en: To measure domain knowledge in English, we leverage the MMLU (Hendrycks et al., 2021a), MMLU-Pro (Wang et al., 2024b) and SuperGPQA (Team et al., 2025) benchmarks as well as for creative problem-solving and AGIEval (Zhong et al., 2023) for standardized exam performance. For the assessment of Chinese knowledge, we employ C-Eval (Huang et al., 2023), CMMLU (Li et al., 2023), and Xiezhi (Gu et al., 2024).
items.zh: 为了衡量英文领域知识，我们利用MMLU（Hendrycks等人，2021a）、MMLU-Pro（Wang等人，2024b）和SuperGPQA（Team等人，2025）基准测试，以及用于创造性问题解决的AGIEval（Zhong等人，2023）和标准化考试表现。对于中文知识评估，我们使用C-Eval（Huang等人，2023）、CMMLU（Li等人，2023）和Xiezhi（Gu等人，2024）。

items.en: To evaluate mathematical reasoning capabilities, we utilize CMath (Wei et al., 2023) and GSM8K (Cobbe et al., 2021) for foundational problem-solving tasks, as well as MATH (Hendrycks et al., 2021b) for assessing advanced mathematical problem-solving proficiency.
items.zh: 为了评估数学推理能力，我们使用CMath（Wei等人，2023）和GSM8K（Cobbe等人，2021）进行基础问题解决任务，以及MATH（Hendrycks等人，2021b）评估高级数学问题解决能力。

items.en: Code generation skills are evaluated with HumanEval (Chen et al., 2021), MBPP (Austin et al., 2021) and MCEval (Chai et al., 2024). Additionally, the ability to handle diverse function calls and complex instructions is measured through the BigCodeBench benchmark (Zhuo et al., 2025).
items.zh: 代码生成技能通过HumanEval（Chen等人，2021）、MBPP（Austin等人，2021）和MCEval（Chai等人，2024）进行评估。此外，处理多样化函数调用和复杂指令的能力通过BigCodeBench基准测试（Zhuo等人，2025）衡量。

items.en: As shown in Table 2, we compare dots.llm1 with other leading open-source base models under identical conditions. The results demonstrate that dots.llm1, with only 14B activated parameters, achieves superior performance compared to DeepSeek-V2, and delivers results comparable to Qwen2.5 72B. This makes dots.llm1 one of the most economical and powerful mixture-of-experts models available to date.
items.zh: 如表2所示，我们在相同条件下将dots.llm1与其他领先的开源基础模型进行比较。结果表明，dots.llm1仅用14B激活参数就实现了优于DeepSeek-V2的性能，并与Qwen2.5 72B相当。这使得dots.llm1成为迄今为止最经济且强大的混合专家模型之一。

items.en: For a detailed breakdown across different categories, we use Qwen2.5 72B as the baseline for comparison. dots.llm1 demonstrates comparable performance to Qwen2.5 72B across most domains. (1) On language understanding tasks, dots.llm1 achieves superior performance on Chinese language understanding benchmarks, which can be attributed to our data processing pipeline. (2) In knowledge tasks, while dots.llm1 shows slightly lower scores on English knowledge benchmarks, its performance on Chinese knowledge tasks remains robust. (3) In the code and mathematics domains, dots.llm1 achieves higher scores on HumanEval and CMath. Interestingly, for mathematics, we observe that dots.llm1 achieves better performance in the zero-shot setting compared to the few-shot setting, with an improvement of over 4 points. We leave further investigation of this phenomenon to future work.
items.zh: 为了在不同类别中进行详细分解，我们以Qwen2.5 72B作为比较基线。dots.llm1在大多数领域表现出与Qwen2.5 72B相当的性能。（1）在语言理解任务上，dots.llm1在中文语言理解基准测试中取得了更优性能，这归功于我们的数据处理流程。（2）在知识任务中，虽然dots.llm1在英文知识基准测试中得分略低，但其在中文知识任务上的表现仍然稳健。（3）在代码和数学领域，dots.llm1在HumanEval和CMath上取得了更高分数。有趣的是，对于数学，我们观察到dots.llm1在零样本设置下比少样本设置下表现更好，提升了超过4个点。我们将这一现象的进一步研究留待未来工作。

items.capEn: Figure 3: The loss curve highlights the consistent stability of the training process. At 6 trillion training tokens, we adjusted our batch size from 64 million to 96 million. At 8.3 trillion, we further increased it to 128 million.
items.capZh: 图3：损失曲线凸显了训练过程的一致稳定性。在6万亿训练token处，我们将批次大小从6400万调整为9600万。在8.3万亿处，我们进一步将其增加到1.28亿。

items.en: As depicted in Figure 3, the loss curve highlights the remarkable stability of the training process. Throughout the training period, there are no incidents of irrecoverable loss spikes or the need for rollback operations.
items.zh: 如图3所示，损失曲线凸显了训练过程的显著稳定性。在整个训练期间，没有出现不可恢复的损失尖峰或需要回滚操作的情况。

items.en: To assess the quality of our web data, we conduct validation experiments comparing it to the TxT360 dataset (Tang et al., 2024), which represents the current state-of-the-art (SOTA) in open-source web data. The experiments are performed using a 1.5 billion parameter dense model, with the same architecture as Qwen2.5 1.5B. We randomly sample 350 billion tokens for training to obtain reliable experimental results. As illustrated in Figure 4, our results surpass those of TxT360, demonstrating the high quality of our web data through our processing pipeline.
items.zh: 为了评估我们网络数据的质量，我们进行了验证实验，将其与TxT360数据集（Tang等人，2024）进行比较，该数据集代表了当前开源网络数据的最先进水平（SOTA）。实验使用一个15亿参数的密集模型进行，架构与Qwen2.5 1.5B相同。我们随机采样3500亿token进行训练，以获得可靠的实验结果。如图4所示，我们的结果超过了TxT360，证明了我们处理流程所生成的网络数据的高质量。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Comparison of performance curves between the TxT360 dataset and our web data on the MMLU, TriviaQA, NaturalQuestions, HellaSwag, PIQA, and LAMBADA (Paperno et al., 2016) benchmarks. The results demonstrate that training with our web data consistently yields superior performance.
items.capZh: 图4：TxT360数据集与我们的网络数据在MMLU、TriviaQA、NaturalQuestions、HellaSwag、PIQA和LAMBADA（Paperno等人，2016）基准上的性能曲线比较。结果表明，使用我们的网络数据进行训练始终能获得更优的性能。

items.en: We use RULER (Hsieh et al., 2024) on the base models to evaluate long-context capabilities. As shown in Table 3, dots.llm1 delivers competitive performance at both 8K and 16K context lengths.
items.zh: 我们在基础模型上使用RULER（Hsieh等人，2024）来评估长上下文能力。如表3所示，dots.llm1在8K和16K上下文长度下均展现出有竞争力的性能。

items.en: As highlighted in Table 4, dots.llm1 showcases significant efficiency in terms of training costs. The comparison reveals that our approach substantially reduces the GPU hours required per one trillion tokens. Qwen2.5 72B model (in our optimized framework) requires 340K GPU hours, while dots.llm1 reduces this to just 130K GPU hours, leading to substantial savings in computational resources and expenses. Furthermore, if we consider the entire pretraining process, dots.llm1 requires only 1.46 million GPU hours, whereas Qwen2.5 72B consumes 6.12 million GPU hours, representing a reduction of 4×\times in total computational resources. This substantial gap demonstrates the cost-effectiveness and scalability of dots.llm1, making it a more economical choice for large-scale pretraining.
items.zh: 如表4所示，dots.llm1在训练成本方面展现了显著的效率。比较显示，我们的方法大幅减少了每万亿token所需的GPU小时数。Qwen2.5 72B模型（在我们的优化框架下）需要34万GPU小时，而dots.llm1将其减少到仅13万GPU小时，从而大幅节省了计算资源和费用。此外，如果考虑整个预训练过程，dots.llm1仅需146万GPU小时，而Qwen2.5 72B消耗612万GPU小时，总计算资源减少了4倍。这一巨大差距证明了dots.llm1的成本效益和可扩展性，使其成为大规模预训练中更经济的选择。

items.en: Based on open-source data and internally annotated data, we collect approximately 400K instruction tuning instances, focusing on several key areas: multi-lingual (primarily Chinese and English) multi-turn dialogues, knowledge understanding and question answering, complex instruction following, and reasoning tasks involving mathematics and coding.
items.zh: 基于开源数据和内部标注数据，我们收集了约40万条指令微调实例，重点关注以下几个关键领域：多语言（主要是中文和英文）多轮对话、知识理解与问答、复杂指令遵循，以及涉及数学和编码的推理任务。

items.en: For multi-turn dialogue capabilities, we integrate mainstream open-source dialogue datasets with our extensive collection of high-quality internal Chinese instruction sets. For a small subset of responses in the open-source data that are of insufficient quality, we refine them using powerful teacher models (e.g., DeepSeek-V3 0324 (DeepSeek-AI et al., 2024)). To enhance knowledge understanding QA abilities, we specifically incorporate datasets focused on factual knowledge and reading comprehension. For complex instruction following, we meticulously design instruction sets with conditional constraints and filtered out responses that failed to adhere to these conditions. To develop reasoning capabilities, we introduce verifiable mathematics and coding datasets, equipped with corresponding verifiers to filter and extract high-quality supervision signals.
items.zh: 对于多轮对话能力，我们整合了主流的开源对话数据集和我们大量高质量的中文内部指令集。对于开源数据中一小部分质量不足的回复，我们使用强大的教师模型（例如DeepSeek-V3 0324（DeepSeek-AI等人，2024））进行优化。为了增强知识理解问答能力，我们特别加入了专注于事实知识和阅读理解的数据集。对于复杂指令遵循，我们精心设计了带有条件约束的指令集，并过滤掉未能遵循这些条件的回复。为了发展推理能力，我们引入了可验证的数学和编码数据集，并配备相应的验证器来筛选和提取高质量的监督信号。

items.en: The fine-tuning process of dots.llm1.inst consists of two phases. In the first phase, we perform upsampling and multi-session concatenation on our 400K instruction tuning instances, then fine-tune dots.llm1.inst for 2 epochs. In the second phase, we further enhance the model's capabilities in specific domains (such as mathematics and coding) through rejection sampling fine-tuning (RFT), incorporating a verifier system to improve performance in these specialized areas. During each training phase, we employ a cosine learning rate scheduler with a learning rate of 5e-6 that gradually decayed to a minimum of 1e-6.
items.zh: dots.llm1.inst的微调过程包括两个阶段。在第一阶段，我们对40万条指令微调实例进行上采样和多轮拼接，然后对dots.llm1.inst进行2个epoch的微调。在第二阶段，我们通过拒绝采样微调（RFT）进一步增强模型在特定领域（如数学和编码）的能力，并引入验证器系统以提高这些专业领域的性能。在每个训练阶段，我们采用余弦学习率调度器，学习率为5e-6，逐渐衰减至最小值1e-6。

items.en: We evaluate dots.llm1.inst on a series of post-training benchmarks and compared it with state-of-the-art models (DeepSeek-AI, 2024b; DeepSeek-AI et al., 2024). Our evaluation framework covers five main categories: English general capabilities, Chinese general capabilities, alignment, and two specific subdomains—mathematics and coding.
items.zh: 我们在系列后训练基准上评估了dots.llm1.inst，并将其与最先进的模型（DeepSeek-AI，2024b；DeepSeek-AI等人，2024）进行了比较。我们的评估框架涵盖五个主要类别：英语通用能力、中文通用能力、对齐，以及两个特定子领域——数学和编码。

items.en: For English general capabilities, we primarily use representative QA datasets, such as general question-answering benchmarks like MMLU (Hendrycks et al., 2021a), MMLU-Redux (Gema et al., 2024), and MMLU-Pro (Wang et al., 2024b), expert-level question-answering benchmarks like GPQA (Rein et al., 2023), as well as reading comprehension QA datasets such as DROP (Dua et al., 2019). Additionally, SimpleQA (OpenAI, 2024) evaluates model's ability to answer fact-seeking questions correctly.
items.zh: 对于英语通用能力，我们主要使用代表性的问答数据集，例如通用问答基准MMLU（Hendrycks等人，2021a）、MMLU-Redux（Gema等人，2024）和MMLU-Pro（Wang等人，2024b），专家级问答基准GPQA（Rein等人，2023），以及阅读理解问答数据集如DROP（Dua等人，2019）。此外，SimpleQA（OpenAI，2024）评估模型正确回答事实性问题的能力。

items.en: For Chinese general capabilities, we select CLUEWSC (Xu et al., 2020) for coreference resolution evaluation, C-Eval (Huang et al., 2023) for comprehensive Chinese language understanding capabilities, and C-SimpleQA (He et al., 2024) for factual question answering in Chinese.
items.zh: 对于中文通用能力，我们选择CLUEWSC（Xu等人，2020）进行指代消解评估，C-Eval（Huang等人，2023）进行综合中文语言理解能力评估，以及C-SimpleQA（He等人，2024）进行中文事实性问答评估。

items.en: To measure the instruction-following and human preference alignment of the dots.llm1.inst model, we select rule-based verifiable benchmarks (IFEval (Zhou et al., 2023)) and competitive arena-style benchmarks (AlpacaEval2 (Dubois et al., 2024), ArenaHard (Li et al., 2024)).
items.zh: 为了衡量dots.llm1.inst模型的指令遵循和人类偏好对齐能力，我们选择了基于规则的验证基准（IFEval（Zhou等人，2023））和竞技场式基准（AlpacaEval2（Dubois等人，2024），ArenaHard（Li等人，2024））。

items.en: For mathematics, we evaluate on competition-level benchmarks AIME24 (MAA, 2024) and CNMO24 (Liu et al., 2024b), and standard-difficulty benchmarks MATH (Hendrycks et al., 2021b), GSM8K (Cobbe et al., 2021), and MATH500 (Lightman et al., 2023).
items.zh: 对于数学，我们在竞赛级基准AIME24（MAA，2024）和CNMO24（Liu等人，2024b），以及标准难度基准MATH（Hendrycks等人，2021b）、GSM8K（Cobbe等人，2021）和MATH500（Lightman等人，2023）上进行评估。

items.en: For coding capabilities, we conduct tests on the coding competition LiveCodeBench (Jain et al., 2024), as well as HumanEval (Chen et al., 2021) and MBPP+ (Liu et al., 2024a).
items.zh: 对于编码能力，我们在编程竞赛LiveCodeBench（Jain等人，2024），以及HumanEval（Chen等人，2021）和MBPP+（Liu等人，2024a）上进行测试。

items.en: For general question-answering benchmarks (including MMLU-Pro, DROP, GPQA, SimpleQA, and Chinese SimpleQA), we utilize evaluation prompts provided by the simple-evals111https://github.com/openai/simple-evals framework, while for MMLU-Redux, we apply the zero-shot prompt template from the Zero-Eval222https://github.com/WildEval/ZeroEval repository. For other general and alignment datasets, we follow the evaluation methodologies designed by the original dataset creators.
items.zh: 对于通用问答基准（包括MMLU-Pro、DROP、GPQA、SimpleQA和中文SimpleQA），我们使用simple-evals框架提供的评估提示，而对于MMLU-Redux，我们应用Zero-Eval仓库中的零样本提示模板。对于其他通用和对齐数据集，我们遵循原始数据集创建者设计的评估方法。

items.en: In mathematics evaluations, we adhere to standard practices for mathematical datasets, using ``Please reason step by step, and put your final answer within \boxed{}" for answer extraction. For competitive mathematics benchmarks (e.g., AIME24), we employ temperature sampling and multiple-run averaging to enhance evaluation stability. In our code evaluations for LiveCodeBench, we select data spanning from May 2024 to January 2025. For evaluating MBPP+, we utilized the v0.2.0 release of EvalPlus (Liu et al., 2023), which provides reliable assessment for code generation tasks.
items.zh: 在数学评估中，我们遵循数学数据集的标准做法，使用“请逐步推理，并将最终答案放在\boxed{}中”进行答案提取。对于竞赛级数学基准（例如AIME24），我们采用温度采样和多次运行平均来增强评估稳定性。在LiveCodeBench的代码评估中，我们选择了2024年5月至2025年1月的数据。对于MBPP+的评估，我们使用了EvalPlus（Liu等人，2023）的v0.2.0版本，该版本为代码生成任务提供了可靠的评估。

items.en: Our evaluation results indicate that dots.llm1.inst demonstrates stable and comprehensive performance across multiple general English benchmarks. On question-answering tasks such as MMLU, MMLU-Redux, DROP, and GPQA, dots.llm1.inst delivers competitive results compared to the Qwen2.5 / Qwen3 series models, demonstrating solid knowledge foundations and reasoning abilities.
items.zh: 我们的评估结果表明，dots.llm1.inst在多个通用英语基准上表现出稳定且全面的性能。在MMLU、MMLU-Redux、DROP和GPQA等问答任务上，dots.llm1.inst与Qwen2.5/Qwen3系列模型相比取得了有竞争力的结果，展示了扎实的知识基础和推理能力。

items.en: The model exhibits competitive coding capabilities, though this aspect is not quite as exceptional as its performance in other areas. Compared to the Qwen2.5 series, its coding ability is on par; however, in comparison with more cutting-edge models like Qwen3 and DeepSeek-V3, there remains room for further improvement.
items.zh: 该模型展现出有竞争力的编码能力，尽管这方面不如其他领域表现突出。与Qwen2.5系列相比，其编码能力相当；然而，与Qwen3和DeepSeek-V3等更前沿的模型相比，仍有进一步提升的空间。

items.en: The dots.llm1.inst showcases outstanding mathematical reasoning skills. The model achieves a score of 33.1 on AIME24, underscoring its advanced problem-solving abilities in complex mathematics. On MATH500, it attains a score of 84.8, outperforming the Qwen2.5 series and approaching state-of-the-art results. It also achieved a high score of 40.6 on CNMO24.
items.zh: dots.llm1.inst展示了出色的数学推理能力。该模型在AIME24上获得33.1分，突显了其在复杂数学中的高级问题解决能力。在MATH500上，它获得84.8分，优于Qwen2.5系列，接近最先进的结果。在CNMO24上也取得了40.6的高分。

items.en: The dots.llm1.inst demonstrates significant advantages in Chinese language tasks. It achieves a score of 92.6 on CLUEWSC, matching industry-leading performance in Chinese semantic understanding. On C-Eval, it achieves 92.2, surpassing all models including DeepSeek-V3 (86.3), thus demonstrating comprehensive mastery of Chinese knowledge. For C-SimpleQA, it scores 56.7, substantially outperforming Qwen-2.5 72B Instruct, though still behind DeepSeek-V3 (68.9).
items.zh: dots.llm1.inst 在中文语言任务中展现出显著优势。它在 CLUEWSC 上获得 92.6 分，达到中文语义理解的行业领先水平。在 C-Eval 上，它获得 92.2 分，超越了包括 DeepSeek-V3（86.3）在内的所有模型，从而展示了全面的中文知识掌握能力。在 C-SimpleQA 上，它得分为 56.7，大幅优于 Qwen-2.5 72B Instruct，但仍落后于 DeepSeek-V3（68.9）。

items.en: With respect to instruction following and alignment with human preferences, dots.llm1.inst demonstrates competitive performance on benchmarks such as IFEval, AlpacaEval2, and ArenaHard. These results indicate that the model can accurately interpret and execute complex instructions while maintaining consistency with human intentions and values.
items.zh: 在指令遵循和与人类偏好对齐方面，dots.llm1.inst 在 IFEval、AlpacaEval2 和 ArenaHard 等基准测试中表现出有竞争力的性能。这些结果表明，该模型能够准确解释和执行复杂指令，同时保持与人类意图和价值观的一致性。

items.en: Based on the evaluation results, dots.llm1.inst demonstrates exceptional performance across Chinese and English general tasks, mathematical reasoning, code generation, and alignment benchmarks while activating only 14B parameters. The model exhibits strong competitive advantages compared to Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct and Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct, and achieves comparable or superior performance relative to Qwen3-32B in bilingual tasks, mathematical reasoning, and alignment capabilities, establishing itself as a highly efficient open-source solution.
items.zh: 基于评估结果，dots.llm1.inst 在仅激活 14B 参数的情况下，在中英文通用任务、数学推理、代码生成和对齐基准测试中均表现出卓越性能。与 Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct 和 Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct 相比，该模型展现出强大的竞争优势，并在双语任务、数学推理和对齐能力方面达到或优于 Qwen3-32B 的水平，从而确立了自己作为高效开源解决方案的地位。

items.en: We examine the expert load of the dots.llm1 model on the Pile test set. For a specific domain DD, with NDN_{D} tokens processed from this domain by the MoE, the expert load of an expert EiE_{i} is defined as:
items.zh: 我们检查了 dots.llm1 模型在 Pile 测试集上的专家负载。对于特定领域 DD，设 MoE 处理了来自该领域的 NDN_{D} 个 token，则专家 EiE_{i} 的负载定义为：

items.en: where NEi,DN_{E_{i},D} represents the number of tokens from domain DD that are routed to expert EiE_{i}. The expert load indicates how specialized expert EiE_{i} is for domain DD. A value of 1 means that every token from the domain is routed to the expert, while a value of 0 implies the expert is never used for that domain.
items.zh: 其中 NEi,DN_{E_{i},D} 表示来自领域 DD 且被路由到专家 EiE_{i} 的 token 数量。专家负载指示专家 EiE_{i} 对领域 DD 的专业化程度。值为 1 意味着该领域的每个 token 都被路由到该专家，而值为 0 则表示该专家从未用于该领域。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Expert load heatmap across layers on the Pile test dataset.
items.capZh: 图 5：Pile 测试数据集上各层的专家负载热力图。

items.en: dots.llm1 shows stronger expert specialization across all layers. In Figure 5, we observe some experts that are activated significantly more than random selection for specific domains, such as DM Mathematics. In contrast, compared to DM Mathematics, the expert load in Wikipedia appears more balanced. This could be because Wikipedia contains a wide range of knowledge and acts like a knowledge graph encompassing various entities. For the Books domain, which contains various types of data, the expert loads appear more balanced. This highlights that the load balancing function works as intended, enabling the model to effectively utilize all experts for handling generic data.
items.zh: dots.llm1 在所有层上显示出更强的专家专业化。在图 5 中，我们观察到一些专家在特定领域（如 DM Mathematics）上的激活程度显著高于随机选择。相比之下，与 DM Mathematics 相比，Wikipedia 中的专家负载显得更加均衡。这可能是因为 Wikipedia 包含广泛的知识，类似于一个涵盖各种实体的知识图谱。对于包含多种类型数据的 Books 领域，专家负载也显得更加均衡。这突显了负载均衡功能按预期工作，使模型能够有效利用所有专家来处理通用数据。

items.en: We introduce dots.llm1, a cost-efficient mixture-of-experts model that achieves state-of-the-art performance for its size. By activating only a subset of parameters per token, dots.llm1 significantly reduces training costs while delivering results comparable with much larger models. Our advanced data processing pipeline produces high-quality training data, and the open-sourcing of intermediate checkpoints provides valuable insights into model learning dynamics. dots.llm1 demonstrates that efficient design and high-quality data can continually expand the capability boundaries of large language models.
items.zh: 我们介绍了 dots.llm1，一种成本高效的混合专家模型，在其规模上实现了最先进的性能。通过每个 token 仅激活一部分参数，dots.llm1 显著降低了训练成本，同时提供了与更大模型相当的结果。我们先进的数据处理流程生成了高质量的训练数据，而中间检查点的开源为模型学习动态提供了宝贵的见解。dots.llm1 证明了高效设计和高质量数据可以不断扩展大型语言模型的能力边界。

items.en: As part of our future work, we aim to train a more powerful model. To achieve an optimal balance between training and inference efficiency, we plan to integrate more efficient architectural designs such as Grouped Query Attention (GQA) (Ainslie et al., 2023), Multi-Head Latent Attention (MLA) (DeepSeek-AI, 2024b), and Linear Attention (Yang et al., 2023; Katharopoulos et al., 2020). Additionally, we intend to explore the use of more sparse mixture-of-experts (MoE) layers to improve the computational efficiency. Furthermore, since data serves as the foundation of pretraining, we will deepen our understanding of what constitutes optimal training data and explore methods to achieve more human-like learning efficiency, maximizing knowledge acquisition from each training example.
items.zh: 作为未来工作的一部分，我们计划训练一个更强大的模型。为了在训练和推理效率之间实现最佳平衡，我们计划集成更高效的架构设计，例如分组查询注意力（GQA）（Ainslie 等人，2023）、多头潜在注意力（MLA）（DeepSeek-AI，2024b）和线性注意力（Yang 等人，2023；Katharopoulos 等人，2020）。此外，我们打算探索使用更稀疏的混合专家（MoE）层以提高计算效率。此外，由于数据是预训练的基础，我们将加深对什么构成最佳训练数据的理解，并探索实现更接近人类学习效率的方法，从每个训练样本中最大化知识获取。
